The service is not intended for individuals as consumers. The Law of the Republic of Uzbekistan "On the Protection of Consumer Rights" does not apply to these services.

hero.title: Take your learning center to the next level!
hero.description: Modme is systematic management, automation, and a digital solution. Reduce manual work, save time, and simplify management

clients.title: A trusted partner of learning centers
clients.subtitle: We have been growing together with educational centers for years

features.heading: Forget your problems!
features.description: Fully systematize all processes from class scheduling to finance, automate manual work, and take control into your own hands

systematize.title: Organize all processes
systematize.description: Easily manage, measure, and organize processes in a single system — Modme has all the features for it

leads.title: Multiply your student count
leads.description: Through a convenient interface, effectively manage communication with every client, guide them to a trial lesson, add them to groups, and control the whole process leading to the first payment

grading.title: Grade and compare students
grading.description: Grade students in every lesson and track results in a general ranking table. Compare students by branch, group, or the whole center and identify the best results. Improve educational quality with a transparent grading system

reminders.title: Plan and control tasks
reminders.description: Create tasks and reminders for yourself and your team. View overdue, today's, and upcoming tasks separately. Completed work is saved in history and you can record the result when closing

integrations.title: Even more convenient with modern technologies
integrations.description: Connect with various useful services and systems through Modme, automate workflow processes, and increase efficiency

finance.title: Easily manage finances
finance.description: Track all payments and expenses in one place, automatically calculate net profit, compute salaries, easily manage debtors, and take your learning center to the next level!

remote.title: Manage your education business from anywhere
remote.description: With our platform, manage your educational business metrics remotely — giving you more time to focus on growing your business!

mobile.title: Modern apps for students and teachers
mobile.description: With "Modme Students App" and "Modme Teachers App", give teachers and students easy access to class schedules, payment status, lesson materials, and other important information. Improve communication efficiency and user experience

withdrawMethod.heading: Flexible and reliable billing
withdrawMethod.description: Choose the most convenient of 6 different payment modes. Every transaction is transparent and performed with minimal error

monthly.name: Monthly (Calendar)
monthly.description: From the date a student is activated in a group through the end of the month, regardless of how many lessons there are, the platform automatically calculates based on the course price (or discounted price). Students' next payment is on the 1st of each month
monthly.example: Regardless of which day in the month the student joins, they pay for the lessons remaining until the end of the month
advantages: Because payments come at the start of each month, control finances and calculate expenses in advance
Ability to pay teachers' monthly salary on time at the beginning of each month
disadvantages: Not suitable for other payment modes

daily.name: Daily
daily.description: From the date the student is activated in the group, the platform automatically calculates the fee for each lesson based on the course price (or discounted price). Students pay for each lesson
daily.example: Regardless of which day in the month the student joins, they pay on each lesson day for every remaining lesson
advantages: Money is deducted from the student's balance per lesson, not for a whole month
No refunds for the old group when a student moves between groups
No money is deducted from frozen students
disadvantages: Not all payments come on one day — since they happen on each lesson day, payments come gradually throughout the month

module.name: Module
module.description: In this mode, you can choose how many lessons should be paid by students per cycle
module.example: If you set it to charge every 12 lessons, the platform will charge every 12 lessons from the group's opening date. If a student is activated at the 4th lesson, they will pay for the remaining 8 lessons in the module. The platform calculates the required payment based on the activation date
advantages: 12 or 13 lessons in a month don't affect groups in this mode
You can create modules (subscriptions) that fit your needs
disadvantages: Not all payments come on one day — some groups' modules fall in the middle of the month

groupstart.name: Group start date
groupstart.description: In this mode, the payment day for students in a group is considered the group's start date
groupstart.example: If the group opens on the 14th, then the 14th of each month becomes the payment day. Students pay a full month's fee based on the course price (or discounted price)
advantages: If new groups open after accumulating enough students, deducting from the group start date ensures you get full payment regardless of when in the month it happens
The student's payment date always stays the same (the group start date)
disadvantages: Not all payments come on one day — some groups' start dates fall on various dates in the month

coursepayment.name: Course payment
coursepayment.description: In this mode, the student pays a one-time fee for the entire duration of the course
coursepayment.example: For a 6-month course with a total fee of 6,000,000 soums, upon the first activation, the full 6,000,000 soums is automatically entered as a debt on the platform
advantages: Great for online courses or education businesses that charge up-front for the entire course
disadvantages: Not suitable for other payment modes

individual.name: Individual
individual.description: In this mode, whenever the student is activated in the group, the platform automatically deducts money on that same date each month
individual.example: If the student is activated on the 15th, the 15th of each month becomes the payment day
advantages: Provides the ability to pay on the same date each month from the student's arrival date
disadvantages: Not all payments come on one day — some students' payments fall on different dates in the month

advantages.heading: What will you get with us?
advantages.description: Modme — is the best choice for your education business!

support.title: Technical support
support.description: Dedicated managers assigned to you contribute to your success and provide continuous support

consultation.title: Free Online Consultation
consultation.description: We offer a free consultation service to grow your learning center. Our experts will suggest the best solutions for you

security.title: Security
security.description: Your data is protected by us with three-layer security. Your trust matters to us!

interface.title: Convenient Interface
interface.description: With a user-friendly and easy-to-use interface, you can learn and launch the platform in a short time!

items.name: MuhammadAli Eshonqulov
items.comment: In the first 2 months of Yuksalish Leaders Academy, we faced many difficulties — in financial accounting, expansion, and managing branches systematically. Then a platform that saved us came along: Modme. Using this platform made our work much easier!

items.name: Shahzod Sobirov
items.comment: This platform makes work much easier. I wish we had used it from the very start of our learning center — it would have saved us many losses. Because it truly solved our problems, I recommend Modme CRM to everyone!

items.name: Alloma Sakhiyeva
items.comment: We've only been using it properly for a month, but since switching to Modme our work became much easier, thank God — I'm saying it sincerely. May Allah give you even more strength, Modme team — good luck with your work!

items.name: Doston Nuraliyev
items.comment: A month after starting to use Modme, student numbers increased dramatically. We pay great attention to systematizing now — because as the learning center grew, management became harder, but after using Modme our work became much easier. With this platform, I always have complete information on how many students there are, how many are in debt, how many are leaving, as well as the financial status and conversion rates.

items.name: Muhammadjon Uzoqov
items.comment: We systematized our learning center with Modme CRM and the results were better than we thought. Now I'm focusing on marketing to further develop the learning center.

items.question: What is Modme and who is it for?
items.answer:
Modme — is a CRM system designed for educational centers that helps automate student registration, financial management, lesson scheduling, reporting, and more.

Modme is suitable for private learning centers, courses, tutoring centers, and any other educational institutions

items.question: How detailed are the financial reports?
items.answer: Fully automated: every payment, discount, debt, monthly report, and transaction is reflected in the system

items.question: Is the application cloud-based or does it need to be installed on a computer?
items.answer: Modme runs entirely in the cloud — accessible from any device, anywhere

items.question: Is there a trial period?
items.answer: Yes, we have a free demo version — you can try and use it for up to 7 days

items.question: How can I pay?
items.answer: You can pay for the platform through the following link:

about.metaDescription: Modme — CRM system specifically designed for the largest learning centers in Uzbekistan. Learn more about our team and mission.

items.title: Founding
items.description: Modme was founded in 2020. The company's founders are Jahongir Pulatov, founder of Cambridge Learning Center, and Ruslan Yuldashev, founder of Mars IT School. They created the Modme CRM platform to automate internal processes of educational centers and simplify management

items.title: Our project reached break-even
items.description: The project covers its own expenses. An important milestone for our system that helped simplify the lives of over 40 learning centers and 10,000+ students in 15 months

items.title: Rapid growth and first investments
items.description: In 2022, Modme experienced significant growth. amoCRM founder Mikhail Tokovinin invested in the company, which gave a boost to the project's development

items.title: Major investment and international expansion
items.description:
In 2023, Modme received a $100,000 investment from the UzVC fund. This fund, partnering with London's Sturgeon Capital, valued the Modme project at $1,250,000.

The company also started entering the Indonesian market and expanded its operations internationally

items.title: Expansion of products and services
items.description: Modme launched its own mobile app, giving learning centers the ability to use the app with their own logo and name. Additionally, the `Modme Audit` service was introduced, allowing learning centers to analyze their performance and improve efficiency

items.title: Today
items.description: Modme is helping learning centers automate their marketing, finance, sales, and customer service departments through its CRM and LMS platforms

metadata.title: amoCRM Integration | Modme CRM
metadata.description: Connect your amoCRM account to Modme in just a few minutes. Step-by-step guide: connection, domain entry, authorization, and trigger status selection.
metadata.keywords: Modme amoCRM, amoCRM integration, connect amoCRM, amoCRM Modme CRM, amoCRM leads

amocrmIntegration.heading: Modme & amoCRM integration
amocrmIntegration.subtitle: Connect your amoCRM account to Modme in minutes. Only the lead's name and phone number are added to Modme.
amocrmIntegration.stepsSubheading: Just 4 simple steps and the integration is ready

step1.title: Open the Integrations section
step1.description: In your Modme CRM settings, open the Integrations section and click the Connect button in the amoCRM card.

step2.title: Enter your amoCRM domain
step2.description: Provide the full address of your amoCRM account (e.g., example.amocrm.ru) and click Continue.

step3.title: Sign in to amoCRM
step3.description: After redirection, sign in to your amoCRM account to grant Modme access to your data.

step4.title: Select the trigger status
step4.description: In the integration settings, choose the pipeline status that will automatically push lead contact data into Modme.

result.heading: Integration result
result.description: When a lead reaches the selected trigger status in your amoCRM pipeline, the lead's name and phone number will automatically appear in the Leads section of Modme.
result.note: Only the lead's name and phone number are transferred to Modme — no other data.

cta.heading: Still have questions?
cta.description: If you run into any difficulties during the setup, reach out to our technical support team.

imageAlt.hero: Leads from amoCRM in Modme CRM

oferta.title: PUBLIC OFFER
oferta.subtitle: for the conclusion of a contract for the provision of paid services granting access to the “modme.uz” software under the SaaS model
intro: This document (hereinafter referred to as the “Offer”) has been prepared in accordance with Articles 367 and 370 of the Civil Code of the Republic of Uzbekistan and constitutes a public offer containing all the essential terms of a contract for the provision of paid services to grant access to the “modme.uz” software under the SaaS (Software as a Service) model.
This proposal to enter into a contract (the “Offer”) is addressed to legal entities and individual entrepreneurs intending to use the “modme.uz” software to conduct their own business activities.
The contract is concluded in accordance with the procedure provided for by the legislation of the Republic of Uzbekistan, through acceptance of this Offer.

Acceptance of the Offer is the date of successful payment made by the Customer according to the selected Rate; from that moment, the contract becomes legally binding, equivalent to a contract executed in writing.

Without contradicting the provisions of this Offer, the Contractor and the Customer have the right, by mutual agreement, to formalize the contract as a separate written bilateral document confirming the relationship established on the basis of the public offer. In this case, if there is a discrepancy between the terms of the Agreement and the terms of this Offer, the provisions of the concluded individual Agreement shall take precedence.

This version of the Public Offer shall enter into force upon its publication on the Contractor’s website at https://modme.uz/ and shall remain in effect until the Contractor officially notifies of its withdrawal or amendment of its terms.
The Contractor has the right to withdraw the Offer at any time at its discretion prior to acceptance.

Please be sure to review the text of the Offer before accepting it. If you do not agree with any specific provision of the Offer, including the applicable Annexes, in its entirety, do not accept the Offer.
oferta.notice: This Offer is a legal document that governs the use of the modme.uz platform. If you have paid for access to the platform, you automatically agree to the terms set forth below.

sections.title: 1. GENERAL PROVISIONS
paragraphs: This Public Offer is the official proposal of MODME LLC (TIN 307442900), referred to as the Contractor, to legal entities and individual entrepreneurs to enter into an agreement for paid services to provide access to the modme.uz software under the SaaS model.
The Offer contains all essential terms of the paid services agreement. The agreement is concluded by accepting this Offer without signing a paper copy.
The Offer is intended only for professional and business use and does not apply to individuals acting as consumers.
Acceptance means successful payment under the selected Tariff. The person accepting the Offer becomes the Customer.

The Service means the modme.uz software developed by the Contractor, hosted in cloud infrastructure and provided to the Customer via the Internet for automation of business processes, customer management and internal workflow.
The Customer receives access to the Service without transfer of ownership, copies of software, source code or exclusive rights.
The Offer and related documents may be published in Uzbek, Russian and English. If language versions differ, the Uzbek text has priority as the state-language version.

sections.title: 2. SUBJECT MATTER OF THE AGREEMENT
paragraphs: The Contractor provides the Customer with remote access to the modme.uz Service under the SaaS model, and the Customer accepts and pays for these services.
The Service provides technical functionality for maintaining a customer database, automating business processes, interacting with counterparties and performing other tasks available in the Service.

The Contractor may optionally provide access to the LMS module for uploading educational materials, conducting lessons and tests, and providing access to students. Such content belongs to the Customer, and the Contractor is not responsible for its substance or legal compliance.
Access is provided through the web interface at https://modme.uz, API integrations where necessary, and a mobile application if it is available and supported.

The Customer uses the Service only for its own business activities within the paid tariff and access period. The Service is provided on an as-is basis, except for guarantees expressly stated in this Offer.
Services are provided in the Republic of Uzbekistan, while access may be made from any location subject to compliance with the laws of Uzbekistan.

sections.title: 3. REGISTRATION AND ACCOUNT
paragraphs: After paying for a Tariff, the Customer registers on the Contractor's website and creates an account to access the Service.

During registration, the Customer provides the required information, including company name, TIN, contact person, e-mail, phone number and other information necessary for identification and communication.
Registration confirms the Customer's consent to this Offer, the Personal Data Processing Policy and the Cybersecurity Policy.
The person registering the account confirms that they are authorized to act on behalf of the Customer. The Customer bears all risks related to lack of authority of such person.
The Customer guarantees that all registration data is accurate and up to date and must promptly update or notify the Contractor of changes.
The Customer is responsible for the confidentiality of logins, passwords, tokens and access codes, and for all actions performed through its account.
If account control is lost, a password is compromised or unauthorized access is suspected, the Customer must immediately notify the Contractor.
The Contractor may temporarily restrict or block access if the Customer violates the Offer, fails to pay on time, creates a cybersecurity threat, or if required by law or government authorities.

sections.title: 4. RIGHTS AND OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES
paragraphs: The Contractor must provide access to the Service under the selected Tariff, protect Customer data through technical and organizational measures, inform the Customer about planned maintenance, provide electronic documents and process personal data only for performance of the agreement.

The Contractor may temporarily suspend access for maintenance, modify the Service without degrading the general level of availability and quality, change tariffs after publication, block access in case of violations, send service notices and use anonymized statistics to improve services.

The Customer must comply with the Offer and appendices, use the Service lawfully and only for business purposes, pay on time, keep access credentials confidential, provide accurate data, and comply with personal data, cybersecurity, advertising and e-commerce laws.

The Customer may use the Service within the paid Tariff, request technical support, receive acts and invoices, upgrade or renew the Tariff, submit requests and proposals, and require confidentiality and protection of its data.
The Customer may contact the Contractor by e-mail, through the feedback form on https://modme.uz, or via the official Telegram manager account indicated on the Service website.

The Customer may not use the Service to process unlawful information, interfere with security systems, attempt to obtain source code, send spam or malware, transfer account access, overload infrastructure, or damage the Contractor's reputation.
The parties must keep confidential all information received in connection with the agreement unless disclosure is required by law or approved in writing by the other party.

sections.title: 5. PAYMENT AND DOCUMENTATION
paragraphs: The cost of services is determined according to prices published at https://modme.uz and in Appendix No. 1, Tariffs.
Tariffs are set in Uzbek soums (UZS). Unless otherwise stated, the service cost does not include VAT or bank and payment-system commissions.
Payment is made by 100% prepayment to the Contractor's bank account, by online payment systems integrated with the Service, or by bank cards connected to the national payment system of Uzbekistan.
The first payment is made before conclusion of the agreement. Payments for new access periods must be made no later than one calendar day before the start of the relevant period.
The payment date is the date funds are credited to the Contractor's bank account or the date the payment system confirms the transaction.
At the end of each paid month or access period, the Contractor forms and sends the Customer an act of services rendered and an electronic invoice through the electronic document workflow system.

The Customer must sign the act and invoice with an electronic digital signature or provide a reasoned refusal within five calendar days. If no objections are provided, the services are deemed accepted in full.

The agreement is automatically renewed for the same period if payment for the next period is received. If payment is not received, the agreement is automatically terminated after the previous access period ends.

Refunds are possible only in limited cases such as mistaken or duplicate payment, unauthorized charge caused by a payment system, Contractor billing error, documented non-provision of services due to the Contractor, or early termination initiated by the Contractor before the paid period ends.

Refunds are not made if the Customer stops using the Service at its own discretion, if the Service works according to its description but does not meet subjective expectations, or if access is suspended due to the Customer's violation.

sections.title: 6. INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
paragraphs: The Service is an object of intellectual property protected by the laws of Uzbekistan, including civil and copyright legislation.

All exclusive property and non-property rights to the Service, its components, design, database structure, source code, documentation, interfaces, logos and other elements belong exclusively to the Contractor.
Nothing in this Offer transfers ownership or exclusive rights in the Service to the Customer.
The Contractor grants the Customer a non-exclusive, limited, non-transferable and revocable right to use the Service within the Offer, paid Tariff and access period.

The Customer may not copy, modify, adapt, translate, decompile or otherwise attempt to obtain the Service source code; transfer access to third parties; remove copyright or trademark notices; create derivative products; or use the Service in violation of law.
The Contractor does not claim ownership of Customer Content and uses it only to ensure operation of the Service and performance of the agreement.

sections.title: 7. PROCESSING AND PROTECTION OF PERSONAL DATA
paragraphs: The Customer is the owner and operator of personal data placed in the Service while using its functionality.

The Contractor acts as an operator regarding data received during registration and use of the Service by the Customer and its representatives, and as a third party regarding personal data placed by the Customer in the Service.
The Contractor processes personal data only on the Customer's instructions and to the extent necessary to perform contractual obligations.
The Service may process registration data, data placed by the Customer or its employees while working with clients, and technical data automatically collected during use of the Service.
The Contractor does not independently collect or process personal data of the Customer's clients. Such data is processed on the Customer's instruction and under the Customer's responsibility.
Processing is carried out for performance of the agreement, communication with the Customer, security and stable operation of the Service, and compliance with the legislation of Uzbekistan.

By registering and paying for services, the Customer confirms that it has provided consent to process its personal data and has obtained consent from employees and clients whose data it enters into the Service.
Personal data databases processed by the Contractor are located and registered in Uzbekistan. Server and hosting capacities are located in Uzbekistan.
After termination of the agreement or upon written request, data may be deleted or anonymized within sixty calendar days unless otherwise required by law.
Questions and requests relating to personal data may be sent to crmmodme@gmail.com.

sections.title: 8. CYBERSECURITY AND INFORMATION PROTECTION
paragraphs: The Contractor protects the Service and Customer data using technical and organizational measures aimed at preventing unauthorized access, loss or alteration of information.
Security measures include HTTPS and SSL/TLS, access control and user authentication, antivirus and anti-malware protection, regular software updates and role-based employee access to Customer data.

The Contractor regularly conducts internal security audits and infrastructure vulnerability testing under the Cybersecurity Policy. Audit results are not disclosed but may be provided in summarized form upon written request.
The Contractor is responsible for data security within its technical area of responsibility, including servers, communication channels and Service infrastructure.
The Customer is responsible for the security of its accounts, passwords and actions of users to whom it has granted access.
The Contractor is not liable for losses caused by transfer of passwords to third parties, use of unsafe equipment or networks, or unlawful actions of the Customer's employees or counterparties.
The Contractor performs regular backups to prevent data loss. Backup frequency, retention and restoration procedures are determined by internal regulations.

In case of unauthorized access, leakage, virus attack or other incidents affecting Customer data, the Contractor takes immediate measures to localize the threat and notifies the Customer within 24 hours after detection.
If an incident involves personal data leakage, the Contractor also notifies the State Cybersecurity Center and other competent authorities as required by Uzbekistan law.

sections.title: 9. LIABILITY OF THE PARTIES
paragraphs: Each party is liable for proper performance of its obligations within the limits established by Uzbekistan law and the agreement.
The Contractor is liable for providing access within the paid Tariff and access period, protecting Customer data within its technical responsibility, and restoring access within a reasonable time.

The Customer is liable for accuracy of registration data, confidentiality of access credentials, actions of its employees and users, legality of data placed in the Service, and lawful use of the Service.
If the Customer violates this Offer or applicable law, it must compensate the Contractor for losses, including costs of investigation and mitigation of incident consequences.

The Contractor is not liable for Service failures caused by Customer equipment or communication channels, third-party actions, data loss caused by the Customer, incorrect use of the Service or failure to follow instructions.
The Contractor does not guarantee absolute uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service but will use reasonable efforts to ensure stable functioning.

The Contractor is not liable for lost profits, loss of data or revenue, or indirect losses. If the Contractor is at fault, its liability is limited to the amount actually paid by the Customer for the period in which the violation occurred.

The parties are released from liability for non-performance caused by force majeure, including natural disasters, fires, floods, earthquakes, military actions, riots, strikes, terrorism, government actions, energy or telecom failures, epidemics or data-center failures.

sections.title: 10. TERMINATION OF THE AGREEMENT
paragraphs: The Customer may refuse further use of the Service by notifying the Contractor at least five calendar days before the end of the current paid period. Payments for the unused period are not refunded except as provided in Section 5.
The agreement ends after the paid period if the Customer does not pay for the next period and does not intend to renew access.
The Contractor may stop providing services by notifying the Customer at least five calendar days before the end of the current paid period through the account or by e-mail.
If the Contractor terminates the agreement due to the Customer's violation, funds for the unused period are not refunded and are retained as contractual penalty.
If termination by the Contractor is not caused by the Customer, the unused amount is refunded under Section 5.
The parties may terminate the agreement by mutual consent with at least five calendar days' written notice.
After termination, access to the Service stops. The Contractor keeps Customer Content and provides export capability for sixty calendar days after termination.

Upon written request, the Contractor provides data export in a machine-readable format within ten working days. After export and confirmation of receipt, copies are deleted from working systems and backups within sixty calendar days unless otherwise required by law.

sections.title: 11. DISPUTE RESOLUTION PROCEDURE
paragraphs: All disagreements and disputes concerning performance, amendment, termination or interpretation of this Offer and the agreement should be resolved through negotiations.
Before going to court, the party whose rights are allegedly violated must send a written claim describing the dispute and proposing voluntary settlement.
Claims regarding scope and quality of services are sent to the Contractor's e-mail with supporting materials such as screenshots or correspondence.
The claim review period is up to ten working days. If the claim is accepted, the Contractor eliminates the deficiencies or provides compensation such as access extension or cost recalculation.
Disputes not resolved by negotiation are considered by the court at the place of state registration of the Contractor. The parties recognize this jurisdiction as final and binding.

sections.title: 12. FINAL PROVISIONS
paragraphs: The Offer, agreement, additional agreements, appendices, acts and invoices may be signed through an electronic document workflow system using an electronic digital signature.

Other documents, notices and information related to the agreement may be sent by e-mail, messengers or electronic document workflow systems. The parties recognize the legal force of electronic documents and messages.
The Contractor may amend this Offer, its appendices, tariffs and related documents.
All amendments are published on https://modme.uz and become effective from publication unless otherwise stated.
Continued use of the Service after amendments become effective means the Customer's consent to the new version of the Offer.
If the Customer disagrees with amendments, it may stop using the Service, notify the Contractor and stop paying for subsequent periods.
This Offer remains valid until it is withdrawn or replaced by a new version. The new version cancels previous versions and applies to relations arising after its publication.
The version effective at the moment of payment remains valid until the end of the paid access period unless the new version expressly provides otherwise.

sections.title: 13. APPENDICES
paragraphs: Appendices to this Offer are published on the Contractor's official website at https://modme.uz and form an integral part of the Offer.
The appendices include: Appendix No. 1 — Tariffs; Appendix No. 2 — Technical Support Policy; Appendix No. 3 — Personal Data Processing Policy; Appendix No. 4 — Cybersecurity Policy.

sections.title: 14. CONTRACTOR’S DETAILS
paragraphs: MODME Limited Liability Company
Legal address: Republic of Uzbekistan, Tashkent, Mirzo-Ulugbek district, Navnikhol MFY, Tepamasjid street, house 4a
Bank details: account 20208000905235041001 at OPERU JSCB Kapitalbank
E-mail: crmmodme@gmail.com
Website: https://modme.uz

legalInfo.address: Republic of Uzbekistan, Tashkent, Mirzo-Ulugbek district, Navnikhol mahalla, Tepamasjid street, house 4A.
